allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path src -Recurse -Include *.tsx,*.ts | ForEach-Object { \(Get-Content $_FullName -Raw\) -replace ''WMS Portal'', ''CTS Portal'' | Set-Content $_FullName -NoNewline }")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path ''C:\\Users\\dt\\Downloads\\fileswms\\wms-clean\\src'' -Recurse -Include ''*.tsx'',''*.ts'' | ForEach-Object { $content = Get-Content -Path $_FullName -Raw; $updated = $content -replace ''WMS Portal'', ''CTS Portal''; if \($content -ne $updated\) { Set-Content -Path $_FullName -Value $updated -NoNewline; Write-Host $_FullName } }")

Bash(powershell -Command "& { $files = Get-ChildItem -Path ''C:\\Users\\dt\\Downloads\\fileswms\\wms-clean\\src'' -Recurse -Include ''*.tsx'',''*.ts''; foreach \($file in $files\) { $content = Get-Content -Path $file.FullName -Raw; if \($null -ne $content -and $content.Contains\(''WMS Portal''\)\) { $updated = $content.Replace\(''WMS Portal'', ''CTS Portal''\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($file.FullName, $updated\); Write-Host \(''Updated: '' + $file.FullName\) } } }")
